segments.original_text: 火力とパーセントが積み重なるか

segments.text: Going side B to counter that forward smash!
segments.original_text: 横スマッシュに対しては横ビーで取っていく

segments.text: That's a strong finisher with solid knockback
segments.original_text: さあ起走のパーセントが高い技

full_text: Knockback and percent keep stacking! Going side B to counter that forward smash! That's a strong finisher with solid knockback Hmm, so heavy...
